<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And it is then that the commandment is kept to love as we have been loved, to trust that when love is shared, it multiplies and does not die.<|17.14|>
<|18.54|> Love never dies.<|21.42|>
<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Thank you.<|1.00|><|endoftext|>

<|7.98|> you have brought us out to a spacious place<|11.16|>
<|11.16|> where you invite us to live in love.<|13.66|>
<|15.04|> By the power of your Holy Spirit,<|17.46|>
